issues.description: OnKO trigger is correct, but the GiveDon action is incomplete. Card text states 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — the action must include resting the DON!! card after adding it. Current DSL only adds DON without resting.
GiveDon action missing rest effect. Should be two sequential actions: GiveDon followed by Rest, or GiveDon must include a rest modifier/chained action.
